testcase.name: Accessibility — WCAG 2.1 AA › homepage has no critical accessibility violations

failure.message: accessibility.spec.ts:5:7 homepage has no critical accessibility violations

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › accessibility.spec.ts:5:7 › Accessibility — WCAG 2.1 AA › homepage has no critical accessibility violations
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
